subcategories.Unauthorized Transactions: Customer reports transactions they did not authorize
subcategories.Account Closure Disputes: Issues with closing or closed accounts
subcategories.Fee Disputes: Disagreements about account fees or charges
subcategories.Account Access Issues: Problems accessing online/mobile banking or ATM

Loan Complaints.description: Issues with loans and credit products

subcategories.Interest Rate Disputes: Customer disputes the applied interest rate
subcategories.Mortgage Application Rejection: Customer contests a rejected mortgage application
subcategories.Payment Processing Errors: Payments not applied correctly or lost
subcategories.Early Repayment Issues: Problems with prepaying or settling loans early

subcategories.Communication Issues: Lack of or poor communication from the bank

subcategories.General Banking Complaint: General issues not covered by specific categories
